cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out the order of the birds on the branch. There are five birds: an owl, a hummingbird, a crow, a hawk, and a robin. The statements give us some clues about their positions. First, the problem says the hawk is to the right of the owl. So if I imagine the branch with positions from left to right, the hawk must be somewhere to the right of where the owl is. Next, the hummingbird is to the right of the hawk. So the hummingbird is even further to the right than the hawk. So the order so far could be owl, hawk, hummingbird... but there might be other birds in between.
